overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armored character walking through a snowy mountainous landscape at night under an overcast, sepia-toned sky. The character traverses snow-covered terrain, crests a ridge to reveal a vast canyon or fjord, and walks along the cliff edge surveying the dramatic landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill through deep snow, heading toward a ridge line

entered.detail: steep incline covered in white snow, filling most of the frame
dark boulders partially buried in snow on the left side of the path
uniform dark brown overcast sky with no visible stars or moon

segments.scene_description: The character walks uphill through a desolate snowy landscape under a dark, overcast sky. Scattered rock outcrops dot the snow-covered slopes on either side as the character ascends toward a distant ridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking a deep canyon or fjord

events.description: character crests the ridge revealing a vast canyon with water or ice far below
character steps down slightly or jumps over a small ledge at the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the cliff edge, looking out over the expansive canyon

entered.detail: sharp drop-off at the character's right side, revealing the canyon below
vast deep canyon with dark water or ice at the bottom, stretching into the distance
snow-covered mountain peaks visible across the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the ridge crest and the terrain opens dramatically to reveal a vast canyon or fjord. Walking along the precipice, the character navigates the cliff edge with the deep chasm on the right and distant snow-capped mountains visible across the gap.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain ridge with panoramic canyon views

agents.ego_description: continuing along the cliff edge, occasionally looking toward the canyon and distant landscape

entered.detail: large dark rock formation emerging from the snow on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the snowy cliff edge, with the canyon now extending to the right. Rocky outcrops emerge from the snow on the left as the character surveys the vast, desolate mountain landscape under the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a desolate snowy slope that eventually opens into a vast, dramatic canyon. It begins with the character walking uphill through a bleak landscape of snow-covered slopes and scattered rock outcrops under a dark, overcast sky. As the character reaches the crest of the ridge, the terrain opens abruptly to reveal a deep chasm and distant snow-capped mountains stretching across the horizon. The scene then shifts to a steady progression along the precipice, with the camera tracking the character as they navigate the cliff edge. Finally, the view expands further across the desolate mountain landscape, moving past emerging rocky outcrops while the canyon continues to unfold to the right.
